title: Add MURI — AI Fashion Mockup Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [MURI — AI Fashion Mockup Generator](https://muri-five.vercel.app/) to image
- Transform multiple fabric reference images into a fashion catalogue composition with MURI, an AI-powered sustainable fashion mockup generator.

Fixes #12368

gist.headline: Fresh digital threads
gist.blurb: MURI just dropped into the ecosystem! It's an AI-powered sustainable fashion mockup generator that turns your fabric references into full catalogue compositions.
gist.summary: Added MURI, an AI-powered sustainable fashion mockup generator that transforms fabric reference images into fashion catalogue compositions, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily discover and use MURI to generate sustainable fashion mockups and catalogue compositions from simple fabric reference images.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a fashion mockup generator. The visual should feature Polly the bee acting as a tailor or fashion designer, interacting with fabric swatches or a mannequin, emphasizing creativity and clothing design.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tailor's measuring tape around her neck, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a pixelated fashion mannequin and colorful fabric swatches. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
